input: Build a customer health scoring model for our SaaS platform. We need to track usage patterns, support ticket trends, and billing health across 200 accounts.
notes: Core use case: multi-dimensional health scoring with usage, support, and financial dimensions

input: Our churn rate jumped from 5% to 12% this quarter. Help me identify what early warning signals we should have caught and build a churn prevention framework.
notes: Churn signal detection and intervention playbook design

input: I need to prepare a QBR for our largest enterprise account ($250K ACV). They have been a customer for 2 years and their renewal is in 4 months.
notes: QBR playbook with value delivered section and success plan for enterprise tier

input: Design a customer segmentation model for our 500-account portfolio. We need to determine CSM ratios, touch frequency, and which accounts get high-touch vs tech-touch.
notes: Segmentation by ACV, health score, and lifecycle stage

input: Create an NPS program for our B2B SaaS. We need survey cadence, response action framework, and a closed-loop process for detractors.
notes: NPS/CSAT program design with detractor response SLAs

input: Three of our top-10 accounts have executive sponsors who recently changed roles. Help me build an intervention plan before these accounts become at-risk.
notes: Champion departure intervention and multi-threading strategy

input: We need onboarding success metrics for our new customer cohort. What should we measure during the first 90 days to predict long-term retention?
notes: Onboarding health dimension: time-to-first-value, milestone completion, training adoption

input: Build a renewal playbook with 90/60/30 day cadence. Our renewal rate is 82% and we need to get it above 90%. Include risk mitigation by failure dimension.
notes: Full renewal cadence with dimension-specific risk mitigation interventions

input: Help me find and qualify 50 new leads in the fintech space for our outbound campaign. I need company size, tech stack, and decision-maker contacts.
notes: Pre-sale lead generation belongs to lead-research-assistant, not customer-success

input: I need to write a sales proposal for a $150K deal. Help me structure the pitch deck, pricing options, and ROI projections to close this prospect.
notes: Deal closing and proposal writing belongs to sales-enablement, not customer-success

input: Our customer success team manages accounts post-sale, but three accounts just had their usage drop 25% in one month while simultaneously their champion left the company. What is our playbook?
notes: Compound churn signal pattern: The Silent Retreat + Champion Collapse. Must reference multi-signal risk scoring and immediate escalation.

input: A customer with $80K ACV is requesting a 40% discount at renewal. Their health score is Green across all dimensions and they expanded twice last year. How do we handle this?
notes: Rationalization table scenario: quantify ROI first, negotiate on scope not price. Discount dependency anti-pattern applies.

input: Design an escalation framework with severity levels, response SLAs, and escalation paths for our 300-account CS organization.
notes: Severity-based escalation with SEV-1 through SEV-4 definitions and ownership

input: Map the full customer journey from post-sale handoff through renewal and into advocacy. Include stage definitions, exit criteria, and metrics for each stage.
notes: Lifecycle stages: onboarding, adoption, expansion, renewal, advocacy with exit criteria
